titleStmt.title: SII 18.336: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 336. (B.K. No. 57 of 1933-34.) KŌṆANATAṀBIGE, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken stone near a well on the bank of the Varada river.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka [9]95, Pramādīcha, Vaiśākha pūrṇima, lunar eclipse, Saṁkrānti corresponding regularly to A.D. 1073, April 24, Wednesday.

It records a grant of land for worship and offerings to god Saṁkēśvaradēva by Saṁka-gāvuṇḍa who built the temple. He is stated to have belonged to the Kauśika-kula. The gift was entrusted to Chandrābharaṇa-Paṇḍita.
Kuḷakaraṇa Nāgadēva is stated to have written the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ko . ṁta . ya . na .These letters in
me](ṁ)lla pogaḷe
ne tammugeyoḷgāvuṇḍuge
reyaṁ puge bhīkaraneyda kādu dāyigatana
tti kolvaṁ kāḷaṁ māḷa . Ātaṁgaṁ guṇagaṇadoḷ
kuḷatiḷakaṁ puṭṭidanītaṁ nijakumudavanasasāṁkaṁ saṁka . ©
kuṁbhikuṁbhasthaḷadaḷavidaḷanakhōgrakaṇṭhīrava raṇadaṁgabhairava sa
ttanaya vinayaśīlasaṁpanna vibudha prasannakauśikakuḷakamaḷinīva
ṇāgatavajrapaṁjara vairidikkuṁjara gōtrapavitra parāṁganāputraṁ gaḍiyaṁ
śellaṁ māḷanagandhavāraṇaṁ jayalakṣmīgṛhatōraṇaṁ haracaraṇaka
mataṁgaṁ nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmatu saṁkagā vuṇḍaṁ ta
geyyuttire . rōśadalu hoḷalu vīravikramadaḷavaṁ
kōsigakuḷakumudavanaśaśāṁkaṁ saṁka . taṁ sukha gāvuṇḍage
ḷeyoḷaṁtu haraniḷayamoṁda nacaḷabhaktiyiṁ māḍisida . saṁda bhagīrathōrvvī
dōvitavakke mecci baṁdaṁdina jahnu nittadaṁ koṇḍubaṁdaṁdina dēvadēvana
vasudhātaḷake baṁdaṁdina gaṁgegaṁ meccaṁ varadāsindhuvinatyā
ḷtiḻda baḷḷi māvugaḷi maragaḷiṁ munīśvara riṁ tammugeya paramatīrtthasthāna .
sakavarṣa 995 neya pramādīcasaṁvatsarada vaiśākhada puṇnamiyuṁ sōmagrahaṇamuṁ
saṁkrāntiyuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍibaṁdaṁdina puṇyatithiyoḷu saṁkagāvuṇḍaṁ tannamāḍisida
tīrtthada saṁkēśvaradēvargge biṭṭa Eremattarāṟu kisumattarāṟu numaṁtappa ṟoḷage dēvara snā
na nivēdyakke śrī khaṇḍakkaṁ dhūpakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ khaṇṇasphuṭitakkaṁ jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ mattareṁṭu maṭha
da tapōdhanarasanācchādanakke mattarnnālku © svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyāna dhāraṇavōnānuṣṭhā
ṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīmaccaṁdrābharaṇapaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārā pūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭari
ntī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidaṁge vāraṇāsiyoḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷaṁ prayāgeyargghya tīrtthameṁba puṇya
tīrtthaṁgaḷalu sāsira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadalu kaṭṭisi sāsirvva rccaturvvēdapāragarappasāsirbbaru brāhmaṇarggu
bhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku . Intīdharmavanaḷidaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷ sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsirbbaru brāhma
ṇarumanerkkōṭi tapōdhanarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakanaku . maṭhamidu naiṣṭaka maṭavī maṭhadoḍeyaṁ brāhma
cāriyalladavaraṁ maṭhadiṁ poramaḍisuvudī bidiravaḷḷi santatiya svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭivvarṣasaThe word maṭhadiṁ is written below the line in smaller characters.
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasēturnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ śarvvānnē
tānu bhāginaṁ pārtthivēṁdrānu bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadra . madvaṁśajā paramahīpati vaṁśajā vā
pāpādapētamana#pō bhuvi bhāvibhūpā yē pāḷayanti mama dharmmamidaṁ samasthaṁ tēṣāṁ tvayā viracitōṁja
ḷirēṣa mūrdhdhni © muttugaḷaṁ kamaḷabhavaṁ tettisidavoloṁdanoṁdanondire viḷasa dvṛttateyiṁ nuṇpaṁ meyvettire kuḷakara
ṇada nāgadēvaṁ bareda . śrīmatkaliyammōjaṁ likhitavidyādhara . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 18.336 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
